_comment: Audited, deliberately-accepted schema drift for the nightly D1 Schema Drift Check (.github/workflows/d1-schema-drift.yml, scripts/d1-schema-diff.mjs). Every entry below is a column that workers/schema_bootstrap.sql documents but production does not have — confirmed DEAD (zero reachable code path reads or writes it) by a full audit of workers/src/ during the 2026-07-07 column-drift fix (PR #74). Adding these to production would be schema clutter with no offsetting benefit; the audit's conclusion was to leave production as-is. This file lets the drift checker distinguish that deliberate, evidence-backed decision from real, unexpected drift — it must never be used to suppress a column without a concrete reason tied to an actual code audit. Adding an entry here does not change production; it only changes what the CI gate treats as expected.

accepted.reason: Belongs to a separate, already-documented ops_alert_log table — alert_log itself never uses this column.
